executives.name: Frank Hallam
executives.background: Mr. Hallam is a co-founder of the Company and has served as President and CEO since 2022. He was previously CFO from 2002 to 2022. He is a Chartered Professional Accountant and has been involved in the mining industry for over 30 years.

executives.name: Greg Hall
executives.background: Mr. Hall has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. He has served as the Chief Financial Officer since April 2022. He was previously the Corporate Controller of the Company.

executives.name: Kris Begic
executives.background: Mr. Begic has over 25 years of experience in the mining industry, specializing in corporate development and project evaluation. He joined the company in 2011.

board_of_directors.name: Diana Walters
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Walters has over 30 years of experience in the natural resources sector. She is currently the Chair of the Board and has held various executive roles in investment and mining companies.

board_of_directors.name: Frank Hallam
board_of_directors.background: Co-founder, President and CEO of the Company.

board_of_directors.name: Timothy Marlow
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Marlow is a mining engineer with over 40 years of experience in project management and operations globally.

board_of_directors.name: Stuart Harshaw
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Harshaw is a seasoned mining executive with over 30 years of experience, including senior roles at Vale SA.

sources.source_description: Company Website - Management and Directors Page
